summary: Successfully tested Arcolia landing page functionality after recent fixes. All core features working correctly including hidden wallet section on load, Enter Arcolia button interaction, MetaMask error handling, and ARCO token gating implementation.
passed_tests: Landing page displays correctly with medieval gate background image
Page title 'Arcolia - Access Without Permission' correct
Wallet section properly hidden initially (no 'active' class)
Enter Arcolia button visible and clickable with transparent overlay effect
Wallet section appears after clicking Enter Arcolia (gets 'active' class)
Enter button properly hidden after click (display: none)
Wallet status shows correct message: 'Connect your wallet to enter'
MetaMask connect button correctly changes to 'Install MetaMask'
Error message displays: 'MetaMask is not installed. Please install it to continue.'
Wallet info and disconnect button properly hidden (display: none)
All required data-testid attributes present for automated testing
ARCO token gating code implemented with proper ERC20 integration
Token gating configured for multiple networks (Ethereum, Sepolia, Polygon)
Demo mode fallback when token address not configured
